failure.symptom: Requires Lemmy backend API. Bug confirmed via source: profile user page type filter defaults to 'all' but should be 'posts'. Also, CommentItem/Post rendering lacks type filter check — shows both comments and posts regardless of selected tab. Fix changes default to 'posts', adds data.filters.value.type checks in template, and wraps person_view/moderates in {value:} objects.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Lemmy 后端。Bug：用户页 submissions 默认类型错误 + 缺过滤条件
